description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a predominantly blue fuselage accented by orange highlights along the wings, tail, and nose. The wings are sharply swept back and feature small vertical stabilizers at their tips, giving the aircraft an aggressive, high-speed appearance. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a transparent canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. The rear of the airplane is equipped with a prominent jet engine exhaust and twin vertical stabilizers, forming an H-tail design. The undercarriage and landing gear are not visible, implying they may be retractable. The overall design is reminiscent of a high-performance fighter jet, with angular surfaces and a streamlined profile.
description: A blue and orange, swept-wing airplane with a central cockpit, H-tail, and jet engine, resembling a modern fighter jet. Features sharp lines, twin vertical stabilizers, and a streamlined, high-speed design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central cockpit canopy, and sharply swept wings with orange tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the jet engine at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, large jet exhaust, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angular body, cockpit, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with small vertical winglets at the tips and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single transparent canopy
